description: Granting roles/editor or roles/owner at the project to fix a permission error.
body: Failure mode: facing PERMISSION_DENIED, an engineer binds the primitive roles/editor (or owner) at project scope, handing the principal sweeping access. Detection signals: Policy Analyzer shows the principal with editor/owner, IAM Recommender flags excess permissions, and the grant is far broader than the failing call. Do not use primitive roles as a quick fix. Safer fallback: run Policy Troubleshooter to find the exact missing permission, bind the matching predefined role at the lowest resource node, and escalate if only a broad role appears to work.
